# Chrysoberyl

location:

Novello mine, Masvingo, Zimbabwe

description:

This is an outstanding large twinned crystal grouping of alexandrite. In super condition all around.

[Watch Specimen Video](https://player.vimeo.com/video/1066699580)

Size: 3.9 x 3.5 x 1.2 cm (miniature)
